mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, status, admin_id as adminId, create_time as createdAt FROM announcement ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, title, content, status, admin_id as adminId, create_time as createdAt FROM announcement WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcement (title, content, status, admin_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{adminId})
mapper.update: UPDATE announcement SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
